meaning: n.交流者,发报机,列车内通报器
examples: The ideal candidate will be an effective communicator.
"I'm a great communicator, love meeting people , demonstrating blogging skills and immersing myself in other cultures, " he said
Cain is a skilled communicator, and knows how to preach the gospel of conservative politics.
President Obama has communications skills that inspire us, just as the Great Communicator himself did.
